normalization.notes: Store Javanese text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep dependent vowel signs, final marks, and pangkon behavior explicit during segmentation review.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base aksara, inherent vowel, sandhangan vowel signs, final marks, pangkon, pasangan forms, and syllable-like chunks
segmentation.notes: Javanese is an abugida. Treat visible aksara clusters and vowel signs as separate pedagogical decisions rather than assuming code points equal lesson units.
